rulings.Case Title: JANET MILLER VS. ANNE M DISNEY FAMILY TRUST BY JAMES H DISNEY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 13, 2015, line 5. DEFENDANT ANNE M DISNEY FAMILY TRUST BY JAMES H DISNEY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to July 28, 2015 to be heard in department 302 at 9:30 a.m. per the order of the presiding judge. Moving party shall comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide a courtesy copy of reply to department 302 no later than March 6, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/req)
